raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/2024 I received a call from a person claiming to be from LLBean ( CitiBank ) Credit card asking if I had made a purchase in the XXXX XXXX. I said no he then proceeded to keep me on the phone for XXXX mins asking me to get a pen and paper to write down the claim number. He then told me another charge was coming in and claimed he was taking care of it, asking me to write the next claim down. He told me he would expedite a new card to me and that I should cut my card up. At one point we were disconnected and he called me back to finalize the issue. It was a month before I got my statement and realized I had been scammed. I have me phone record substantiating this claim. 

Citi bank denied my claim. After many phone calls I Citi Bank employee told me to submit it to the XXXX department. It was declared not Fraud. I received no written notice from the XXXX department. I submitted records on my cell phone proving the two calls, time, date and length, but the department told me I gave my credit card number so it was not fraud. 

I did not give my number at anytime. I have yet to receive written notice as to why it was turned down from the fraud department. Not one person from Citi Bank has called me for clarification on the case before deciding that I am to blame. 

Total fraud charges to my credit card {$6400.00}
